message.content:
<teammate-message teammate_id="steve-schoger" color="pink" summary="Acknowledged, transition motion preference noted">
Good catch on the motion preference for transitions. I'll make sure the todo item component CSS wraps any transition durations in `@media (prefers-reduced-motion: no-preference)`. The color values change regardless -- only the animation timing is conditional.

We're aligned. I'll deliver the full todo item component CSS spec when we get to Task #6.
</teammate-message>

content.text:
Good. Steve Schoger confirmed the motion preference detail. Everything is aligned between us. He'll deliver the component CSS spec when we reach the todo list task.

Nothing for me to act on. Standing by.
